hospital_services.title: Emergency and Trauma Care
hospital_services.short_description: 24/7 immediate medical response for acute illnesses and traumatic injuries.
hospital_services.long_description: Our Emergency and Trauma department is equipped with state-of-the-art life-saving technology and staffed by specialized physicians and nurses. We provide rapid assessment, intervention, and stabilization for critical conditions. Our team is trained to handle mass casualties, cardiac emergencies, stroke symptoms, severe injuries, and other life-threatening situations with minimal waiting time.

faqs.question: Do I need an appointment for emergency services?
faqs.answer: No, our emergency department operates 24/7 and accepts walk-in patients. In critical situations, call our ambulance service immediately.

faqs.question: What should I bring to the emergency department?
faqs.answer: Please bring your ID card, insurance information, list of current medications, and any relevant medical records.

hospital_services.meta_title: Emergency & Trauma Care Services | 24/7 Medical Response
hospital_services.meta_description: Round-the-clock emergency medical services with advanced life support systems and specialized trauma care team. Immediate response for critical conditions.

hospital_services.title: Cath-Lab Services
hospital_services.short_description: Advanced cardiac intervention and diagnostic imaging for heart conditions.
hospital_services.long_description: Our Catheterization Laboratory (Cath-Lab) provides minimally invasive procedures to diagnose and treat cardiovascular diseases, including angioplasty, stenting, and coronary angiography. Equipped with the latest imaging technology, our lab ensures precise diagnosis and effective treatment of heart conditions with reduced recovery time and minimal discomfort.

faqs.question: What is a coronary angiogram?
faqs.answer: A coronary angiogram is a procedure that uses contrast dye and X-rays to see how blood flows through the arteries in your heart.

faqs.question: How long does a cath-lab procedure take?
faqs.answer: Most procedures take 30-60 minutes, but preparation and recovery time may add 2-4 hours total.

hospital_services.meta_title: Cath-Lab Services | Advanced Cardiac Care & Heart Treatment
hospital_services.meta_description: State-of-the-art catheterization laboratory for cardiac interventions including angioplasty, stenting, and coronary angiography. Expert cardiologists and modern technology.

hospital_services.title: Radiology Services
hospital_services.short_description: Comprehensive diagnostic imaging including X-ray, CT Scan, and Ultrasound.
hospital_services.long_description: We offer a full range of imaging services to support accurate diagnosis. Our department features high-resolution digital imaging equipment managed by expert radiologists. From routine X-rays to advanced MRI and CT scans, we provide precise imaging results with quick turnaround times to aid in effective treatment planning.

faqs.question: Is radiology safe during pregnancy?
faqs.answer: Most radiology procedures use minimal radiation. However, always inform your doctor if you are pregnant or suspect pregnancy for necessary precautions.

faqs.question: How long does a CT scan take?
faqs.answer: A typical CT scan takes 10-30 minutes depending on the body part being examined.

hospital_services.meta_title: Radiology Services | Advanced Diagnostic Imaging Center
hospital_services.meta_description: Comprehensive radiology services including X-ray, CT Scan, MRI, and Ultrasound. High-resolution digital imaging with expert radiologists for accurate diagnosis.

hospital_services.title: In-Patient Services
hospital_services.short_description: Comfortable and professional care for patients requiring overnight stays.
hospital_services.long_description: Our in-patient facilities range from general wards to private suites, ensuring constant monitoring and care from our dedicated medical staff during your recovery. Each room is designed for patient comfort with modern amenities, nurse call systems, and regular physician visits. We provide comprehensive care including meals, medications, nursing support, and rehabilitation services.

faqs.question: Can family members stay overnight?
faqs.answer: Yes, attendants are allowed in private and deluxe rooms. Semi-private rooms have limited visitor hours.

faqs.question: Are meals included?
faqs.answer: Yes, all in-patients receive customized meals based on their dietary requirements.

hospital_services.meta_title: In-Patient Services | Comfortable Hospital Stay & Care
hospital_services.meta_description: Comfortable in-patient facilities with modern amenities and 24/7 medical care. Choose from general wards, private rooms, or deluxe suites for your recovery.

hospital_services.title: Out-Patient Services
hospital_services.short_description: Specialized consultations and treatments without the need for hospital admission.
hospital_services.long_description: Providing access to specialists across various medical disciplines for diagnosis, follow-up care, and minor procedures on a walk-in or appointment basis. Our OPD features comfortable waiting areas, multiple consultation rooms, and integrated diagnostic services for a seamless healthcare experience.

faqs.question: Do I need a referral for a specialist?
faqs.answer: Most specialists can be consulted directly. Some insurance plans may require a primary care referral.

faqs.question: How do I book an appointment?
faqs.answer: You can book online through our website, call our appointment desk, or walk in during OPD hours.

hospital_services.timing: Monday - Saturday: 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM | Sunday: 9:00 AM - 1:00 PM
hospital_services.meta_description: Access to multi-specialty out-patient services with experienced doctors. Online appointment booking, digital records, and integrated diagnostics available.

hospital_services.title: OT and Surgical Services
hospital_services.short_description: Modern Operation Theaters for major and minor surgical procedures.
hospital_services.long_description: Our surgical suites are designed to maintain the highest standards of sterility and safety, catering to orthopedic, general, and specialized surgeries. Each OT is equipped with laminar airflow systems, advanced anesthesia workstations, and high-definition surgical cameras for minimally invasive procedures.

faqs.question: What is the recovery time after surgery?
faqs.answer: Recovery time varies by procedure. Minor surgeries may need 1-2 days, while major surgeries can require weeks of recovery.

faqs.question: Is minimally invasive surgery available?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer laparoscopic and keyhole surgeries for many procedures with faster recovery.

hospital_services.timing: Monday - Saturday: 8:00 AM - 8:00 PM | Emergency Surgeries: 24/7
hospital_services.meta_title: Surgical Services | Modern Operation Theaters & Procedures
hospital_services.meta_description: State-of-the-art operation theaters for major and minor surgeries. Advanced equipment, expert surgeons, and minimally invasive options available.

hospital_services.title: Optical Diagnostics Services
hospital_services.short_description: Comprehensive eye examinations and vision correction diagnostics.
hospital_services.long_description: Advanced optical care including glaucoma screening, retinal check-ups, and precise vision testing to ensure optimal eye health. Our ophthalmology department uses cutting-edge diagnostic equipment for early detection of eye diseases and vision problems.

faqs.question: How often should I get my eyes checked?
faqs.answer: Adults should have a comprehensive eye exam every 1-2 years. Diabetics and those with eye conditions need annual checks.

faqs.question: Does the test hurt?
faqs.answer: No, all diagnostic tests are non-invasive and painless.

hospital_services.meta_title: Optical Diagnostics | Comprehensive Eye Care Services
hospital_services.meta_description: Complete eye examination and vision testing services. Advanced diagnostic equipment for early detection of glaucoma, retinal diseases, and vision problems.

hospital_services.title: Pain Management Services
hospital_services.short_description: Specialized care for chronic and acute pain relief.
hospital_services.long_description: Interdisciplinary approaches to manage pain through therapy, medication, and advanced interventional techniques to improve quality of life. Our pain management specialists work together to create personalized treatment plans addressing the root cause of your pain.

faqs.question: How long does pain management treatment take?
faqs.answer: Treatment duration varies based on condition. Some patients see improvement in weeks, while chronic conditions may need ongoing management.

faqs.question: Are injections painful?
faqs.answer: Local anesthesia is used to minimize discomfort. Most patients tolerate procedures well.

hospital_services.meta_title: Pain Management Services | Chronic Pain Relief & Treatment
hospital_services.meta_description: Specialized pain management for chronic and acute conditions. Multidisciplinary approach including injections, therapy, and rehabilitation.

hospital_services.title: Critical Care Services
hospital_services.short_description: Intensive monitoring and treatment for life-threatening conditions (ICU/CCU).
hospital_services.long_description: Our Critical Care Unit provides 1:1 nursing care and advanced life support for patients who are hemodynamically unstable. Equipped with advanced monitoring systems, ventilators, and crash carts, our ICU team is trained to handle severe medical emergencies and post-operative complications.

faqs.question: What is visiting policy in ICU?
faqs.answer: Limited visiting hours (30 minutes, twice daily) to ensure patient rest and prevent infections.

faqs.question: How long do patients stay in ICU?
faqs.answer: Stays vary from 1-2 days to several weeks depending on the severity of the condition.

hospital_services.meta_title: Critical Care Services | Intensive Care Unit (ICU/CCU)
hospital_services.meta_description: Advanced intensive care unit with 24/7 monitoring and specialized critical care team. Life support systems and emergency response for critical patients.

hospital_services.title: Skin & Aesthetics Clinic
hospital_services.short_description: Dermatological treatments and advanced aesthetic procedures.
hospital_services.long_description: Expert dermatological care for skin conditions alongside modern aesthetic treatments for skin rejuvenation and cosmetic enhancement. Our clinic offers medical dermatology for conditions like acne, eczema, and psoriasis, as well as cosmetic procedures including laser treatments, chemical peels, and anti-aging therapies.

faqs.question: Are aesthetic procedures painful?
faqs.answer: Most procedures involve minimal discomfort. Topical anesthetics are used when needed.

faqs.question: How many sessions of laser hair removal are needed?
faqs.answer: Typically 6-8 sessions spaced 4-6 weeks apart for optimal results.

hospital_services.meta_title: Skin & Aesthetics Clinic | Dermatology & Cosmetic Treatments
hospital_services.meta_description: Comprehensive dermatology and aesthetic treatments including laser therapy, chemical peels, and anti-aging procedures. Expert care for all skin conditions.
